# This directory holds the compiled AutoIt script (postilion_install.exe).
# The .exe is generated by compiling scripts/autoit/postilion_install.au3
# using the compile_autoit.ps1 helper script.
#
# To compile:
#   cd scripts/autoit
#   .\compile_autoit.ps1
#   Copy-Item postilion_install.exe ..\..\roles\postilion_realtime\files\
